name: midday_report
description: Midday update. Continuation of the morning read, not a fresh assessment. How the morning's calls are playing out, anything new developing, updated levels.

morning_reference_narrative.description: How the morning's read is playing out. Tie this update to the morning report.

narrative.description: Update for this asset since the morning report.

assets.description: Per-asset updates. Brief when nothing changed, detailed when something developed.

trigger_condition.description: Condition type that activates this setup.

trigger_level.description: Price or indicator value that triggers the setup.

trigger_field.description: For indicator triggers: indicator name (e.g. 'rsi_14_1h'). Null for price triggers.

target_level.description: Price target if the setup plays out.

invalidation_level.description: Price level that invalidates this setup.

confidence.description: Confidence in this setup (0.0-1.0). Be honest — this feeds calibration tracking.

narrative.description: Why this setup matters. Updated or new setups from the midday reassessment.

setups.description: Updated or new setups. Carry forward morning setups that are still valid (may adjust levels), add new ones, drop ones that are no longer relevant.

market_narrative.description: Overall midday editorial. Shortest of the three daily reports — brief when quiet, detailed when active.

magnitude.description: How significant in market terms. Pure impact assessment.

surprise.description: How unexpected given the current read.

regime_relevance.description: Does this potentially change the bigger picture.
